title: NIMHANS Notification 2026 - Walk-in interview for Senior Resident Posts
description: The National Institute of Mental Health and Neuro Sciences (NIMHANS) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Senior Resident Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their MD/MS and DNB can apply for the NIMHANS Notification 2026. The interested applicants can attend the walk-in interview.
